content_en:
Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 139

because of them, and the people will be more harmed by their corpses than they were harmed (by them) when they were alive. The people will invoke (Allah) for help, and He #¢ will send a wind...and over people will be anxiety and smoke, and they will be afflicted with colds. But after three, that situation will be removed from them. Their corpses (ie. of Yajooj and Majooj) will be thrown into the sea. Only a short time will pass before the sun rises from its West. The pens are dried and the scrolls are rolled up, and repentance will not be accepted from anybody (at that time). Iblees (Satan) will fall down in prostration, calling out, ‘My God, order me to prostrate to whomsoever You wish.’ The devils will gather to him and say, ‘O our leader, to whom are you turning for help?’ He will say, ‘I only asked my Lord to give me respite until the Day of Resuxrection, and the sun has indeed risen from its West. This is the well-known time.’ The devils will become visible on earth, to the extent that a man will say, “This is my Qareen (companion from the jinn) who used to entice me toward (evil). All praise is for Allah, Who has disgraced him.’ Iblees will continue to be in prostration, crying, until the Beast will come out and kill him while he is prostrating, The believers will enjoy themselves for forty years after that; they will desire nothing that is not given to them. The believers will be left until 40 years are completed after the beast. Then death will return among them, and it will come quickly, until there remains not a single believer, ‘The disbeliever will say, ‘Repentance will not be accepted from us: would that we had been believers.’ They will openly engage in sexual intercourse in the roads just as donkeys do, to the extent that a man will engage in sexual intercourse with his mother in the middle of the road. One will stand and another will descend (to do the same). The best of them will be he who says, ‘If you were to withdraw from the road, that would be better’ They will remain upon that state, and not a single one of them will be born through marriage. Then Allah will make the women sterile for thirty years, and they will all be the children of fornication - the worst of people, and upon them will the Hour come to pass.” This narration is related by Na’eem ibn Hammad in Kitaab AL-Fitan, and also by At-Tabaraanee.

A Narration That Is Rejected

Al-Hasan reported that the Messenger of Allah #4 said, “The Dajjaal will reach the clouds and plunge into the sea until his knee, and he

140 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

will precede the sun from its West; and the hills will travel with him. On his forehead is a horn that is broken from one side. Drawn on his body are all weapons, even the spear, sword, and Dirq.” ‘Alee ibn Zaid asked Hasan, “O Abu Sa’eed, what is Dirg?” He said, “A shield.” Our Shaikh, Al-Haafiz Adh-Dhahabee, said, “This is from the Mursal narrations of Al-Hasan, and it is weak.”

Hudhaifah # related that the Messenger of Allah #¢ said, “I am more knowledgeable of what the Dajjaal has with him than he is, He has with him two rivers; one of them is a blazing fire in the eyes of one who sees it. And the other is white water, As for whoever from you reaches him, then let him close his eyes and drink from the river of fire that is with him, for it is in actuality cold water. Stay away and beware of the other, for it is Fitnah (a trial). And know that “Kaafir’ (disbeliever) is written between his two eyes: those who write and those who do not write (Le., the literate and the illiterate) will read it. One of his two eyes is effaced; upon it is coarse skin. At the end of his life, he will overlook the heart of Jordon from Thaniyyah Fee (a city in Sham, between Damascus and Tripoli). Every one who believes in Allah and the Last Day (at that time) will be in the heart of Jordon, He will kill one-third of the Muslims, he will vanquish one-third, and one-third will remain. The night will act as a barrier between them (between the army of Muslims and the army of the Dajjaal). Some of the believers will say to others from them, ‘What are you looking at (or waiting for)? Do you not want to catch up with your brothers in the pleasure of your Lord? Whoever has extra food should give it to his brother. When Fajr breaks forth, pray, and pray it early. Then head towards your enemy.’ When they will stand and pray, ‘Eesa will descend, and their Imam will lead them in prayer...The Dajjaal will dissolve like salt dissolves in water. ‘The Muslims will then be given power over them, and they will kill them. Even a rock and a tree will call out, ‘O ‘Abdullah, O Muslim: this is a Jew, so kill him.’ The Muslims will be victorious and the cross will be broken. The pig will be killed and ALJizyah will be removed. While they are upon that state, Allah will make Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) come-out. The first of them will drink; the last of them will come dehydrated, and they will not find a drop. They will say, “Here is the trace of water.’ Allah’s Prophet and his Companions are behind them until they (.e. Yajooj and Majooj)

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 141

enter a city from the cities of Palestine, which is called Baab Lud. They will say, ‘We have triumphed over those on the earth, so come and let us kill whoever is in the sky.’ Allah’s Prophet will supplicate to Allah, and Allah 4 will send upon them an ulcer in their throats (ie. the throats of Yajooj and Majooj), and not a single one from them will remain. But their smell will harm the Muslims. ‘Hesa will supplicate over them, and Allah will send a wind upon them, which will throw them all into the sea.” Ibn Mundah, in Kitaab Al-Eemaan, relates this narration. Our Shaikh, Abu ‘Abdullah Adh-Dhahabee, said, “This chain is good.” However, its context and phrasing is Ghareeb and it mentions Munkarah things, and Allah 4% knows best.

142 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

The Messenger of Allah ‘Eesa Ibn Maryam Will Descend From The Heaven Of The Earth To The Earth At The End Of Time

Allah a said: 5S OS at Ls Bo oe el OE G sels fo ba WS os oot A bs

“And because of their saying (in boast), “We killed Messiah ‘Eesa Qesus), son of Maryam (Mary), the Messenger of Allah,” — but they killed him not, nor crucified him, but the resemblance of ‘Eesa (Jesus) was put over another man (and they killed that tan), and those who differ therein are full of doubts. They have no (certain) knowledge, they follow nothing but conjecture. For surely; they killed him not (i.e. ‘Fesa (Jesus), son of. Maryam (Mary). But Allah raised him (‘Eesa) up (with his body and soul) unto Himself (and he Agel is im the heavens). And Allah is Ever All-Powerful, AllWise]

25 Bs BY OS Wap

“And there is none of the people of the Seripiure (Jews and Christians), but must believe in him (‘Eesa, as only a Messenger of Allah and a human being), before his death’! Regarding “before his death’ in this last Verse, Ibn Jareer related in his Tafseer that Ibn ‘Abbaas 4 said, “Before the death of ‘Eesa Ibn Maryam.” The chain of this narration is authentic.

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 143

Did ‘Fesa 4 Die Or Was He #s#i Raised Alive To The Sky?

rete pote Mee Oe Seg G a a aoe 4 (655 oy Gy ST St & os ind aie

“And there is none of the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians), but must believe in him (‘Eesa, as only a Messenger of Allah and a human being), before his death’)

Regarding this verse, Abu Maalik said that it is referring to when

‘Besa ibn Maryam 28% will descend and that he is now alive with

Allah #&. When he 2 will descend, all will believe in him. Tbn Jareer related this.

Ibn Abee Haatim related that a man asked Al-Hasan about this Verse:

“And there is none of the people of the Scripture (Jews and

Christians), but must believe in him (‘Eesa, as only a Messenger of

Allah and a human being), before his death’? Al-Hasan said, “Before the death of ‘Eesa 842, Allah % raised ‘Eesa to Him and He # will send him (back) before the Day of Resurrection, in a situation wherein both the righteous one and the wicked one will believe in him.” Qataadah ibn Du’aamah, “Abdur-Rahmaan ibn Yazeed Ibn Aslam, and others have said the same, which is also established in Bukhaaree and Muslim from Abu Hurairah . As we will mention, one narration is mawquf (i.e. Abu Hurairah & said it) and another is Marfoo’ (ie, Abu Hurairah & related it from the Prophet #%). And Allah #% knows best. The point is that ‘Eesa 388 is alive now in the heavens, and he was not, as the People of the Book claim, crucified; instead, Allah #% raised him to Him. Before the Day of Resurrection, ‘Eesa $28 will descend from the sky; such is related in Mutawaatir hadith narrations, both in the Ahaadeeth we related regarding the Dajjaal and the Ahandeeth we will mention shortly. We seek help from Allah and depend upon Him alone. There is neither might nor power

144 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

except with Allah, the Most-Powerful, the All-Wise, the Most High, the All-Mighty. None has the right to be worshipped but Allah, the Lord of the Noble ‘Arsh (Throne).

It is related from Ibn ‘Abbaas #: and others that the antecedent of the pronoun in “before his death’ is every individual from the People of the Book; if this is authentically narrated from him, then it is contrary to what we have said. But in actuality, the correct meaning and chain of narration is what we have previously mentioned, and what we have explained in sufficient detail in the Book of Tofseer. All praise is for Allah, and all favors and blessings are from Him.

Narrations Pertaining To Issues That We Have Not As Of Yet Discussed
content_id:
Kitab Akhir Zaman: Berbagai Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 139

karena mereka, dan orang-orang akan lebih dirugikan oleh bangkai-bangkai mereka daripada kerugian yang mereka rasakan (dari mereka) ketika masih hidup. Orang-orang akan memohon (pertolongan Allah), dan Dia # akan mengirimkan angin...dan di atas orang-orang akan ada kegelisahan dan asap, dan mereka akan diserang oleh pilek. Tetapi setelah tiga (hari), keadaan itu akan hilang dari mereka. Bangkai-bangkai mereka (yakni Ya'juj dan Ma'juj) akan dilemparkan ke laut. Hanya sedikit waktu yang akan berlalu sebelum matahari terbit dari Baratnya. Pena-pena telah dikeringkan dan gulungan-gulungan telah digulung, dan taubat tidak akan diterima dari siapapun (pada saat itu). Iblis akan terjatuh dalam sujud, berseru, 'Tuhanku, perintahkanlah aku untuk bersujud kepada siapapun yang Engkau kehendaki.' Para setan akan berkumpul mengelilinginya dan berkata, 'Wahai pemimpin kami, kepada siapa kamu meminta pertolongan?' Ia akan berkata, 'Aku hanya meminta kepada Tuhanku agar memberiku penangguhan sampai Hari Kebangkitan, dan matahari telah terbit dari Baratnya. Inilah waktu yang sudah diketahui.' Para setan akan terlihat di bumi, sampai-sampai seorang laki-laki akan berkata, 'Ini adalah qarinku (pendamping dari jin) yang biasa menggodaku kepada (keburukan). Segala puji bagi Allah yang telah menghinakannya.' Iblis akan terus dalam keadaan sujud, menangis, sampai Binatang (Dabbah) akan muncul dan membunuhnya ketika ia sedang bersujud. Para mukmin akan menikmati kesenangan selama empat puluh tahun setelah itu; mereka tidak akan menginginkan sesuatu pun yang tidak diberikan kepada mereka. Para mukmin akan dibiarkan sampai 40 tahun selesai setelah binatang itu. Kemudian kematian akan kembali di antara mereka, dan ia akan datang dengan cepat, sampai tidak tersisa seorang mukmin pun. Orang-orang kafir akan berkata, 'Taubat tidak akan diterima dari kami: andaikan kami dahulu menjadi orang-orang yang beriman.' Mereka akan terang-terangan melakukan hubungan seksual di jalanan seperti keledai, sampai-sampai seorang laki-laki akan melakukan hubungan seksual dengan ibunya di tengah jalan. Yang satu berdiri dan yang lain turun (untuk melakukan hal yang sama). Yang terbaik dari mereka adalah yang berkata, 'Seandainya kamu menjauh dari jalan, itu akan lebih baik.' Mereka akan tetap dalam keadaan itu, dan tidak seorang pun dari mereka akan lahir melalui pernikahan. Kemudian Allah akan menjadikan para wanita mandul selama tiga puluh tahun, dan mereka semua adalah anak-anak hasil zina — orang-orang yang paling buruk, dan atas merekalah Kiamat akan terjadi." Riwayat ini disebutkan oleh Na'im ibn Hammad dalam Kitab Al-Fitan, dan juga oleh At-Thabarani.

Sebuah Riwayat Yang Ditolak

Al-Hasan meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Dajjal akan mencapai awan dan masuk ke laut sampai lututnya, dan ia

140 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Berbagai Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

akan mendahului matahari dari Baratnya; dan bukit-bukit akan berjalan bersamanya. Di dahinya ada tanduk yang patah dari satu sisi. Di tubuhnya tergambar semua senjata, bahkan tombak, pedang, dan Dirq." 'Ali ibn Zaid bertanya kepada Hasan, "Wahai Abu Sa'id, apa itu Dirq?" Ia berkata, "Perisai." Syaikh kami, Al-Hafiz Adh-Dzahabi, berkata, "Ini termasuk riwayat-riwayat Mursal Al-Hasan, dan ia lemah."

Hudzaifah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Aku lebih mengetahui apa yang ada pada Dajjal daripada dirinya. Ia memiliki dua sungai; salah satunya adalah api yang berkobar di mata orang yang melihatnya. Dan yang lainnya adalah air putih. Adapun siapapun dari kalian yang menemuinya, maka hendaklah ia memejamkan matanya dan minum dari sungai api yang bersamanya, karena sesungguhnya itu adalah air dingin. Jauhilah dan waspadailah yang lain, karena itu adalah Fitnah (ujian). Dan ketahuilah bahwa 'Kafir' (kafir) tertulis di antara kedua matanya: mereka yang bisa menulis dan mereka yang tidak bisa menulis (yakni orang yang melek huruf dan yang buta huruf) akan membacanya. Salah satu dari kedua matanya terhapus; di atasnya ada kulit yang kasar. Di akhir hidupnya, ia akan mengawasi jantung Yordania dari Tsaniyyah Fi (sebuah kota di Syam, antara Damaskus dan Tripoli). Setiap orang yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir (pada saat itu) akan berada di jantung Yordania. Ia akan membunuh sepertiga kaum muslimin, ia akan mengalahkan sepertiga, dan sepertiga akan tetap ada. Malam akan bertindak sebagai penghalang di antara mereka (antara pasukan muslimin dan pasukan Dajjal). Sebagian mukmin akan berkata kepada yang lain dari mereka, 'Apa yang kalian tunggu-tunggu? Tidakkah kalian ingin menyusul saudara-saudara kalian dalam kesenangan Tuhan kalian? Siapapun yang memiliki makanan lebih hendaklah memberikannya kepada saudaranya. Ketika fajar tiba, shalatlah, dan shalatlah dengan segera. Kemudian pergilah menuju musuh kalian.' Ketika mereka berdiri dan shalat, 'Isa akan turun, dan imam mereka akan memimpin shalat... Dajjal akan larut seperti garam larut dalam air. Kemudian kaum muslimin diberi kekuasaan atas mereka, dan mereka akan membunuh mereka. Bahkan sebuah batu dan sebuah pohon pun akan berseru, 'Wahai 'Abdullah, wahai Muslim: ini adalah orang Yahudi, maka bunuhlah dia.' Kaum muslimin akan menang dan salib akan dihancurkan. Babi akan dibunuh dan Al-Jizyah akan dihapus. Sementara mereka dalam keadaan itu, Allah akan mengeluarkan Ya'juj dan Ma'juj (Gog dan Magog). Yang pertama dari mereka akan minum; yang terakhir dari mereka akan datang dalam keadaan kehausan, dan mereka tidak akan menemukan setetes pun. Mereka akan berkata, 'Di sini ada bekas air.' Nabi Allah dan para sahabatnya berada di belakang mereka sampai mereka (yakni Ya'juj dan Ma'juj)

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Berbagai Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 141

masuk ke sebuah kota dari kota-kota Palestina, yang disebut Baab Lud. Mereka akan berkata, 'Kami telah menang atas mereka yang ada di bumi, maka marilah kita bunuh siapapun yang ada di langit.' Nabi Allah akan berdoa kepada Allah, dan Allah # akan mengirimkan kepada mereka bisul di tenggorokan mereka (yakni tenggorokan Ya'juj dan Ma'juj), dan tidak seorang pun dari mereka yang akan tersisa. Namun bau mereka akan menyakiti kaum muslimin. 'Isa akan berdoa atas mereka, dan Allah akan mengirimkan angin kepada mereka, yang akan melemparkan mereka semua ke laut." Ibn Mandah, dalam Kitab Al-Iman, meriwayatkan narasi ini. Syaikh kami, Abu 'Abdullah Adh-Dzahabi, berkata, "Sanad ini baik." Namun konteks dan redaksinya Gharib dan menyebutkan hal-hal yang Munkar, dan Allah # lebih mengetahui.

142 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Berbagai Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

Rasulullah 'Isa Ibn Maryam Akan Turun dari Langit ke Bumi Di Akhir Zaman

Allah # berfirman: "Dan karena ucapan mereka (dengan membanggakan diri): 'Sesungguhnya kami telah membunuh Al-Masih, 'Isa putra Maryam, Rasul Allah,' padahal mereka tidak membunuhnya dan tidak pula menyalibnya, tetapi orang yang diserupakan dengan 'Isa bagi mereka (yang terbunuh itu), dan orang-orang yang berselisih tentang itu sungguh dalam keraguan tentang hal itu. Mereka tidak mempunyai pengetahuan tentang itu kecuali mengikuti persangkaan belaka. Dan tidaklah mereka benar-benar membunuhnya (yakni 'Isa putra Maryam). Tetapi Allah telah mengangkat 'Isa ke hadirat-Nya. Dan Allah Maha Perkasa, Maha Bijaksana."

"Dan tidak ada seorang pun dari Ahli Kitab (Yahudi dan Nasrani), kecuali akan beriman kepadanya ('Isa, hanya sebagai Rasul Allah dan manusia biasa) sebelum kematiannya." Mengenai 'sebelum kematiannya' dalam ayat terakhir ini, Ibn Jarir meriwayatkan dalam Tafsirnya bahwa Ibn 'Abbas berkata, "Sebelum kematian 'Isa Ibn Maryam." Sanad riwayat ini sahih.

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Berbagai Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar 143

Apakah 'Isa # Meninggal Dunia Atau Apakah Ia # Diangkat Hidup-Hidup ke Langit?

"Dan tidak ada seorang pun dari Ahli Kitab (Yahudi dan Nasrani), kecuali akan beriman kepadanya ('Isa, hanya sebagai Rasul Allah dan manusia biasa) sebelum kematiannya."

Mengenai ayat ini, Abu Malik berkata bahwa ia merujuk kepada ketika 'Isa ibn Maryam # akan turun dan bahwa ia sekarang hidup bersama Allah #. Ketika ia # akan turun, semua akan beriman kepadanya. Ibn Jarir meriwayatkan ini.

Ibn Abi Hatim meriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Al-Hasan tentang ayat ini: "Dan tidak ada seorang pun dari Ahli Kitab (Yahudi dan Nasrani), kecuali akan beriman kepadanya ('Isa, hanya sebagai Rasul Allah dan manusia biasa) sebelum kematiannya." Al-Hasan berkata, "Sebelum kematian 'Isa #, Allah # mengangkat 'Isa kepada-Nya dan Dia # akan mengutusnya (kembali) sebelum Hari Kebangkitan, dalam suatu keadaan di mana baik orang yang saleh maupun orang yang jahat akan beriman kepadanya." Qatadah ibn Du'amah, 'Abdurrahman ibn Yazid Ibn Aslam, dan lainnya telah mengatakan hal yang sama, yang juga ditetapkan dalam Bukhari dan Muslim dari Abu Hurairah. Sebagaimana akan kami sebutkan, satu riwayat bersifat mawquf (yakni Abu Hurairah yang mengatakannya) dan yang lainnya bersifat Marfu' (yakni Abu Hurairah meriwayatkannya dari Nabi #). Dan Allah # lebih mengetahui. Intinya adalah bahwa 'Isa # sekarang hidup di langit, dan ia tidak, sebagaimana klaim Ahli Kitab, disalib; sebaliknya, Allah # mengangkatnya kepada-Nya. Sebelum Hari Kebangkitan, 'Isa # akan turun dari langit; demikian diriwayatkan dalam hadith Mutawatir, baik dalam hadith-hadith yang kami riwayatkan tentang Dajjal maupun hadith-hadith yang akan kami sebutkan sebentar lagi. Kami memohon pertolongan dari Allah dan bertawakal hanya kepada-Nya. Tidak ada daya dan upaya kecuali dengan Allah, Yang Maha Perkasa, Maha Bijaksana, Maha Tinggi, Maha Agung. Tidak ada yang berhak disembah kecuali Allah, Tuhan 'Arsy yang Mulia.

144 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Berbagai Fitnah dan Malapetaka Besar

Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Abbas dan lainnya bahwa anteseden dari kata ganti dalam 'sebelum kematiannya' adalah setiap individu dari Ahli Kitab; jika ini diriwayatkan secara sahih dari dirinya, maka itu bertentangan dengan apa yang kami katakan. Namun kenyataannya, makna yang benar dan sanad yang benar adalah apa yang telah kami sebutkan sebelumnya, dan apa yang telah kami jelaskan secara memadai dalam Kitab Tafsir. Segala puji bagi Allah, dan semua karunia serta berkah berasal dari-Nya.

Riwayat-Riwayat yang Berkaitan dengan Isu-Isu yang Belum Kami Bahas
content_ar: الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 139 لأن of them, and the people will be more harmed by their corpses than they were harmed (by them) عندما they were alive. The people will invoke (الله) for help, and He #¢ will send a wind...and over people will be القلق and smoke, and they will be afflicted with colds. But بعد three, that situation will be removed from them. Their corpses (ie. of Yajooj and Majooj) will be thrown into the sea. Only a short time will pass قبل the sun rises from its West. The pens are dried and the scrolls are rolled up, and التوبة will not be accepted from anybody (at that time). Iblees (الشيطان) will fall down in prostration, calling out, ‘My God, order me to prostrate to whomsoever You wish.’ The devils will gather to him and say, ‘O our leader, to whom are you turning for help?’ He will say, ‘I only asked my Lord to give me respite حتى the Day of Resuxrection, and the sun has indeed risen from its West. This is the well-known time.’ The devils will become visible on earth, to the extent that a man will say, “This is my Qareen (companion from the الجن) who used to entice me toward (الشر). All praise is for الله, Who has disgraced him.’ Iblees will continue to be in prostration, crying, حتى the Beast will come out and kill him بينما he is prostrating, The المؤمنون will enjoy themselves for forty years بعد that; they will desire nothing that is not given to them. The المؤمنون will be left حتى 40 years are completed بعد the beast. Then الموت will return among them, and it will come quickly, حتى there remains not a single المؤمن, ‘The disbeliever will say, ‘التوبة will not be accepted from us: would that we had been المؤمنون.’ They will openly engage in sexual intercourse in the roads just as donkeys do, to the extent that a man will engage in sexual intercourse with his الأم in the middle of the road. One will stand and another will descend (to do the same). The best of them will be he who says, ‘إذا you were to withdraw from the road, that would be better’ They will remain upon that state, and not a single one of them will be born through marriage. Then الله will make the women sterile for thirty years, and they will all be the الأولاد of fornication - the worst of people, and upon them will the Hour come to pass.” This narration is related by Na’eem ibn Hammad in Kitaab AL-Fitan, and أيضاً by At-Tabaraanee. A Narration That Is Rejected Al-حسن reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله #4 said, “The Dajjaal will reach the clouds and plunge into the sea حتى his knee, and he 140 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations will precede the sun from its West; and the hills will travel with him. On his forehead is a horn that is broken from one side. Drawn on his الجسد are all weapons, even the spear, sword, and Dirq.” ‘Alee ibn Zaid asked حسن, “O Abu Sa’eed, what is Dirg?” قال, “A shield.” Our Shaikh, Al-Haafiz Adh-Dhahabee, said, “This is from the Mursal narrations of Al-حسن, and it is weak.” Hudhaifah # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #¢ said, “I am more knowledgeable of what the Dajjaal has with him than he is, He has with him two rivers; one of them is a blazing fire in the eyes of one who sees it. And the other is white water, أما whoever from you reaches him, then let him close his eyes and drink from the river of fire that is with him, for it is in actuality cold water. Stay away and beware of the other, for it is Fitnah (a الابتلاء). And know that “Kaafir’ (disbeliever) is written between his two eyes: those who write and those who do not write (Le., the literate and the illiterate) will read it. One of his two eyes is effaced; upon it is coarse skin. At the end of his الحياة, he will overlook the القلب of Jordon from Thaniyyah Fee (a city in Sham, between Damascus and Tripoli). Every one who believes in الله and the Last Day (at that time) will be in the القلب of Jordon, He will kill one-ثالثاً of the المسلمون, he will vanquish one-ثالثاً, and one-ثالثاً will remain. The night will act as a barrier between them (between the army of المسلمون and the army of the Dajjaal). Some of the المؤمنون will say to others from them, ‘What are you looking at (or waiting for)? Do you not want to catch up with your brothers in the pleasure of your Lord? Whoever has extra food should give it to his الأخ. عندما Fajr breaks forth, pray, and pray it early. Then head towards your enemy.’ عندما they will stand and pray, ‘Eesa will descend, and their الإمام will lead them in الصلاة...The Dajjaal will dissolve like salt dissolves in water. ‘The المسلمون will then be given power over them, and they will kill them. Even a rock and a tree will call out, ‘O ‘Abdullah, O مسلم: this is a Jew, لذا kill him.’ The المسلمون will be victorious and the cross will be broken. The pig will be killed and ALJizyah will be removed. بينما they are upon that state, الله will make Yajooj and Majooj (Gog and Magog) come-out. The أولاً of them will drink; the last of them will come dehydrated, and they will not find a drop. They will say, “Here is the trace of water.’ الله’s النبي and his الصحابة are behind them حتى they (.e. Yajooj and Majooj) الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 141 enter a city from the cities of Palestine, which is called Baab Lud. They will say, ‘We have triumphed over those on the earth, لذا come and let us kill whoever is in the sky.’ الله’s النبي will supplicate to الله, and الله 4 will send upon them an ulcer in their throats (ie. the throats of Yajooj and Majooj), and not a single one from them will remain. But their smell will harm the المسلمون. ‘Hesa will supplicate over them, and الله will send a wind upon them, which will throw them all into the sea.” Ibn Mundah, in Kitaab Al-Eemaan, relates this narration. Our Shaikh, Abu ‘Abdullah Adh-Dhahabee, said, “This chain is الخير.” غير أن, its context and phrasing is Ghareeb and it mentions Munkarah things, and الله 4% knows best. 142 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations الرسول ﷺ of الله ‘Eesa Ibn Maryam Will Descend From The Heaven Of The Earth To The Earth At The End Of Time الله a said: 5S OS at Ls Bo oe el OE G sels fo ba WS os oot A bs “And لأن of their saying (in boast), “We killed Messiah ‘Eesa Qesus), son of Maryam (Mary), الرسول ﷺ of الله,” — but they killed him not, nor crucified him, but the resemblance of ‘Eesa (عيسى ﷺ) was put over another man (and they killed that tan), and those who differ therein are full of doubts. They have no (certain) العلم, they follow nothing but conjecture. For surely; they killed him not (i.e. ‘Fesa (عيسى ﷺ), son of. Maryam (Mary). But الله raised him (‘Eesa) up (with his الجسد and النفس) unto Himself (and he Agel is im the heavens). And الله is Ever All-Powerful, AllWise] 25 Bs BY OS Wap “And there is none of the people of the Seripiure (Jews and Christians), but must believe in him (‘Eesa, as only a Messenger of الله and a human being), قبل his الموت’! فيما يخص “قبل his الموت’ in this last الآية, Ibn Jareer related in his Tafseer that Ibn ‘Abbaas 4 said, “قبل the الموت of ‘Eesa Ibn Maryam.” The chain of this narration is authentic. الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 143 Did ‘Fesa 4 Die Or Was He #s#i Raised Alive To The Sky? rete pote Mee Oe Seg G a a aoe 4 (655 oy Gy ST St & os ind aie “And there is none of the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians), but must believe in him (‘Eesa, as only a Messenger of الله and a human being), قبل his الموت’) فيما يخص this الآية, Abu Maalik said that it is referring to عندما ‘Besa ibn Maryam 28% will descend and that he is now alive with الله #&. عندما he 2 will descend, all will believe in him. Tbn Jareer related this. Ibn Abee Haatim related that a man asked Al-حسن about this الآية: “And there is none of the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians), but must believe in him (‘Eesa, as only a Messenger of الله and a human being), قبل his الموت’? Al-حسن said, “قبل the الموت of ‘Eesa 842, الله % raised ‘Eesa to Him and He # will send him (back) قبل the Day of البعث, in a situation wherein both the الصالح one and the wicked one will believe in him.” Qataadah ibn Du’aamah, “Abdur-Rahmaan ibn Yazeed Ibn Aslam, and others have said the same, which is أيضاً established in Bukhaaree and مسلم from أبو هريرة . As we will mention, one narration is mawquf (i.e. أبو هريرة & said it) and another is Marfoo’ (ie, أبو هريرة & related it from النبي ﷺ #%). And الله #% knows best. The point is that ‘Eesa 388 is alive now in the heavens, and he was not, as the People of the الكتاب claim, crucified; instead, الله #% raised him to Him. قبل the Day of البعث, ‘Eesa $28 will descend from the sky; such is related in Mutawaatir الحديث narrations, both in the Ahaadeeth we related فيما يخص the Dajjaal and the Ahandeeth we will mention shortly. We seek help from الله and depend upon Him alone. There is neither might nor power 144 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations except with الله, the Most-Powerful, the All-Wise, the Most High, the All-Mighty. None has the الحق to be worshipped but الله, the Lord of the Noble ‘Arsh (Throne). It is related from Ibn ‘Abbaas #: and others that the antecedent of the pronoun in “قبل his الموت’ is every individual from the People of the الكتاب; إذا this is authentically narrated from him, then it is contrary to what we have said. But in actuality, the correct meaning and chain of narration is what we have previously mentioned, and what we have explained in sufficient detail in the الكتاب of Tofseer. All praise is for الله, and all favors and البركات are from Him. Narrations Pertaining To Issues That We Have Not As Of Yet Discussed
